---
title: "Software"
description: "Research software projects by Qingyang Liu."
---

These planned research-code projects will support reproducible analysis and numerical experimentation. Repository links will be added only when the corresponding code is ready for public use.

## Projects

:::: {.card-grid .card-grid--three .software-grid}
::: {.software-card}
<p><span class="status-badge">In development</span></p>

### Charmonium density analysis

Planned tools for organizing, analyzing, and visualizing spatial density correlations in charmonium and charmoniumlike channels.
:::

::: {.software-card}
<p><span class="status-badge">In development</span></p>

### Cornell–Dirac solver

A planned numerical solver for radial Dirac systems with configurable Cornell-like interactions and documented conventions.
:::

::: {.software-card}
<p><span class="status-badge">In development</span></p>

### Two-hadron correlation analysis

Planned workflows for four-point correlation data, symmetry projections, quality checks, and reproducible two-hadron analysis.
:::
::::
